Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\);let s=fs.readFileSync\('src/pages/Fire.tsx','utf8'\);const start=s.indexOf\('// ---------- Form → simulation adapter ----------'\);const marker='\\n\\nconst LIFESTYLE_OPTIONS';const end=s.indexOf\(marker\);if\(start<0||end<0\){console.error\('markers not found',start,end\);process.exit\(1\);}s=s.slice\(0,start\)+s.slice\(end+2\);fs.writeFileSync\('src/pages/Fire.tsx',s\);console.log\('removed',end-start,'chars'\);")

PowerShell($f1 = "src/db/accounts.ts"; $f2 = "src/db/accounts.merge.test.ts"; "accounts.ts bytes: " + \(Get-Item $f1\).Length; "merge.test bytes: " + \(Get-Item $f2\).Length; "--- git log accounts.ts ---"; git log --oneline -- $f1; "--- git log merge.test ---"; git log --oneline -- $f2)

PowerShell(git show HEAD:src/db/accounts.ts | Out-File -FilePath "$env:TEMP\\acc_head.txt" -Encoding utf8; git log --oneline -5 -- src/db/accounts.ts | Out-File -FilePath "$env:TEMP\\acc_log.txt" -Encoding utf8; git status --short | Out-File -FilePath "$env:TEMP\\acc_status.txt" -Encoding utf8; "done")
PowerShell(npx vitest run src/db/accounts.merge.test.ts 2>&1 | Out-File "$env:TEMP\\vitest_merge.txt" -Encoding utf8; "exit=$LASTEXITCODE")

PowerShell($dir = "c:\\workspace\\myFinance\\.github\\pages"; $out = Join-Path $dir ".preview"; if \(-not \(Test-Path $out\)\) { New-Item -ItemType Directory $out | Out-Null }; \(Get-Content -Raw \(Join-Path $dir 'index.template.html'\)\).Replace\('__VERSION__','v0.0.0-preview'\).Replace\('__REPO__','tokans/myFinance'\).Replace\('__RELEASE_URL__','https://github.com/tokans/myFinance/releases/tag/v0.0.0-preview'\).Replace\('__LATEST_URL__','https://github.com/tokans/myFinance/releases/latest'\) | Set-Content -Encoding utf8 \(Join-Path $out 'index.html'\); $rendered = Get-Content -Raw \(Join-Path $out 'index.html'\); "Remaining __ tokens: " + \([regex]::Matches\($rendered,'__[A-Z_]+__'\).Count\); "VERSION occurrences: " + \([regex]::Matches\($rendered,'v0\\.0\\.0-preview'\).Count\); Remove-Item $out -Recurse -Force)

PowerShell($os = Get-CimInstance Win32_OperatingSystem; $freeGB=[math]::Round\($os.FreePhysicalMemory/1MB,1\); $totGB=[math]::Round\($os.TotalVisibleMemorySize/1MB,1\); Write-Output "RAM: $freeGB GB free / $totGB GB total"; $cs=Get-CimInstance Win32_OperatingSystem; Write-Output \("Commit: {0} GB used / {1} GB limit" -f [math]::Round\(\($cs.TotalVirtualMemorySize-$cs.FreeVirtualMemory\)/1MB,1\), [math]::Round\($cs.TotalVirtualMemorySize/1MB,1\)\); Write-Output "--- top RAM consumers ---"; Get-Process | Sort-Object WorkingSet64 -Descending | Select-Object -First 12 Name, @{N='RAM_MB';E={[math]::Round\($_.WorkingSet64/1MB\)}} | Format-Table -AutoSize | Out-String)

PowerShell(Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "Name='java.exe'" | ForEach-Object { $cl=$_.CommandLine; $isGradle = if\($cl -match 'GradleDaemon'\){'GRADLE-DAEMON'}else{'other'}; Write-Output \("PID {0}  [{1}]  WS={2}MB" -f $_.ProcessId, $isGradle, [math]::Round\(\(Get-Process -Id $_.ProcessId\).WorkingSet64/1MB\)\) })

PowerShell(2560,32832 | ForEach-Object { try { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Output "killed Gradle daemon PID $_" } catch { Write-Output "PID $_ already gone" } }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; $os=Get-CimInstance Win32_OperatingSystem; Write-Output \("Now: {0} GB RAM free; commit {1} GB / {2} GB" -f [math]::Round\($os.FreePhysicalMemory/1MB,1\), [math]::Round\(\($os.TotalVirtualMemorySize-$os.FreeVirtualMemory\)/1MB,1\), [math]::Round\($os.TotalVirtualMemorySize/1MB,1\)\))

PowerShell(Get-Process vmmem,vmmemWSL,qemu-system-x86_64 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name, @{N='Commit_MB';E={[math]::Round\($_.PagedMemorySize64/1MB\)}}, @{N='WS_MB';E={[math]::Round\($_.WorkingSet64/1MB\)}} | Format-Table -AutoSize | Out-String; Write-Output "--- editor/claude footprint ---"; Get-Process Code,claude,cursor,Cursor -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object PrivateMemorySize64 -Sum | ForEach-Object { Write-Output \("Code/claude commit total: {0} GB across {1} procs" -f [math]::Round\($_.Sum/1GB,1\), $_.Count\) })

PowerShell(netsh interface ipv4 show excludedportrange protocol=tcp)

PowerShell(function Test-Bind\($addr,$port\){ try { $l=[System.Net.Sockets.TcpListener]::new\([System.Net.IPAddress]::Parse\($addr\),$port\); $l.Start\(\); $l.Stop\(\); "OK  $addr`:$port" } catch { "FAIL $addr`:$port -> $\($_.Exception.InnerException.Message\)" } }; Test-Bind "0.0.0.0" 8000; Test-Bind "127.0.0.1" 8000; Test-Bind "127.0.0.1" 0)

PowerShell($dir="c:\\workspace\\myFinance\\.github\\pages"; $OUT=Join-Path $dir ".preview"; if\(-not\(Test-Path $OUT\)\){New-Item -ItemType Directory $OUT|Out-Null}; $t=[IO.File]::ReadAllText\(\(Join-Path $dir 'index.template.html'\),[Text.Encoding]::UTF8\).Replace\('__VERSION__','v0'\).Replace\('__REPO__','tokans/myFinance'\).Replace\('__RELEASE_URL__','x'\).Replace\('__LATEST_URL__','y'\); [IO.File]::WriteAllText\(\(Join-Path $OUT 'index.html'\),$t,\(New-Object Text.UTF8Encoding\($false\)\)\); $b=[IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\(\(Join-Path $OUT 'index.html'\)\); "has BOM: $\($b[0]-eq0xEF -and $b[1]-eq0xBB -and $b[2]-eq0xBF\)"; $i=[Array]::IndexOf\($b,[byte]0xF0\); "chart emoji bytes F0 9F 93 8A present: $\([System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetString\($b\).Contains\([char]::ConvertFromUtf32\(0x1F4CA\)\)\)"; "mojibake string present: $\([System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetString\($b\).Contains\('ðŸ'\)\)"; Remove-Item $OUT -Recurse -Force)
